search_signals.author: nehalzzzz1
search_signals.text: 2026 Bull Run Roadmap: Feb Bear trap, Mar Bitcoin breakout, Apr Altcoin season, May New ATH near $215K, Jun Bull trap, Jul Liquidation cascade, Aug Bear market begins. I've called every major top & bottom for 10+ years.

search_signals.author: Crypto_Diet
search_signals.text: Bull Run 2026 Pattern: January Accumulation, February Bitcoin Rally, March Alt season, April Bitcoin 250K, May Bull Trap, June Mass Liquidations, July Bear Market. Bookmark this and check back in 6 months.

search_signals.author: deltasage_ai
search_signals.text: Each Bitcoin 200-week moving average touch has preceded exponential rallies, but 2026 sentiment is dismissive despite a historically bullish setup. Supply shock from April 2024 halving combined with institutional lock-in via ETFs has eliminated the floating supply buffer. BTC will likely consolidate in $80k-$110k range through Q2 2026.

search_signals.author: Cryostal
search_signals.text: Benjamin Cowen predicts 2026 as Bitcoin's bear market year, with no new all-time highs and a potential bottom in October, aligning with historical patterns where tops occur in the fourth quarter of each cycle.
